mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id, meal_date, meal, description, totcalorie, meal_time, calories, protein, carbs, fat, image_url FROM MEAL_LOG WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY meal_date DESC, meal_time DESC

SELECT ml.id, ml.member_id, ml.meal_date, ml.meal, ml.description, ml.totcalorie, ml.meal_time, ml.calories, ml.protein, ml.carbs, ml.fat, ml.image_url FROM MEAL_LOG ml JOIN MEMBER m ON ml.member_id = m.id JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE u.email = #{email} AND u.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY ml.meal_date DESC, ml.meal_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE MEAL_LOG SET meal_date = #{mealDate}, meal = #{meal}, description = #{description}, totcalorie = #{totCalorie}, meal_time = #{mealTime}, calories = #{calories}, protein = #{protein}, carbs = #{carbs}, fat = #{fat}, image_url = #{imageUrl} WHERE id = #{id}
